item.title: Silent catch blocks in cloud/ swallow errors with no logging
item.intent: No error in the cloud/ module is silently discarded. Heartbeat reporter failures must be logged — a silent heartbeat calculation error produces incorrect health metrics with no trace.
item.description: 2 catch blocks in src/cloud/heartbeat/reporter.ts swallow errors silently. Line 85: directory size calculation error swallowed, returns partial result (wrong size metrics). Line 101: credentials file read error swallowed, returns 0 count (wrong credential count). Both produce incorrect health data sent to the remote monitoring layer with no indication they failed. Steps: (1) open src/cloud/heartbeat/reporter.ts; (2) find catch blocks at lines 85 and 101; (3) add console.warn() with the error and context for each; (4) do NOT change fallback return values — keep returning partial/0 values on failure; (5) run cloud/ tests to confirm no regression. Scope: 2 one-line additions in one file.
